title: IDF chief says there's 'no ceasefire' in south Lebanon amid continued fighting
snippet: IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir during visit to southern Lebanon: 'On the combat front, there is no ceasefire; you continue to fight.' Ordered troops to 'act with freedom of action and remove any threat' including beyond Yellow Line and north of Litani River.
tag_reason: IDF chief's explicit 'no ceasefire' declaration contradicts official truce — new statement on 4/29
